name: feature.documents.nodes
description: Documents & Templates feature node pack (ADR 0053) — read + agentic-write nodes over the ctx.features.documents surface. list-documents reads an org's documents; assemble renders a template into an augmentedPrompt; generate-from-template assembles → ctx.callAI → creates a document version (idempotency-keyed, replay-safe). Output is validated against the template-owned outputSchema; NO typed artifact.created is emitted (artifact-types RFC 0071/0075 are not implemented in this host).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Documents: List Documents
nodes.description: Lists an org's documents over ctx.features.documents. Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: Documents: List Templates
nodes.description: Lists an org's document templates over ctx.features.documents.listTemplates. Inputs: { orgId, kind? }. Output: { templates }. Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: Documents: Get Template
nodes.description: Fetches one document template by id over ctx.features.documents.getTemplate. Inputs: { orgId, templateId }. Output: { template } (null when absent). Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: Documents: Get Document
nodes.description: Fetches one document by id over ctx.features.documents.getDocument. Inputs: { orgId, documentId }. Output: { document } (null when absent). Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: Documents: Assemble Template
nodes.description: Validates params against a template and renders its body into an augmentedPrompt + outputSchema. No LLM call.

nodes.label: Documents: Generate from Template
nodes.description: Assembles a template, calls ctx.callAI to draft the content, creates a document and an immutable version (idempotency-keyed). Run-scoped generation.

nodes.label: Documents: Render to PDF
nodes.description: Renders a document's current version to PDF and stores it as a Media token on the version (deterministic — no provider). ADR 0057.
